description: Curated Remotion source — compositions NOLAN routes to within Remotion's strong scope. Each entry is discoverable like a Lottie template: it carries a visual_type, a shared theme, and per-effect style vars.

theme.doc: Shared style. Preset name or partial override object.

compositions.description: Word-by-word kinetic typography with highlighted key words, optionally over a b-roll background.
Animated bar comparison with count-up value labels.
Two diverging lines (rising vs falling) from a shared origin — the K-shaped split.
Draw-on circle + arrow + label pointing at a spot on moving b-roll.
Big stat with a drawn circle-emphasis + caption.
Animated pins + routes over a basemap image (money/flow/geo).
Glass/gradient hero or chapter title card with drifting gradient-mesh background.

'Photos on a table' montage with a per-card motion system: each card declares where it rests (x,y,scale,rotation) and how it arrives (from edge + timing + easing) — e.g. one slides up to center, one in from the left to rest on the left. Polaroid/plain/cutout frame styles, handwritten captions, a slow Ken Burns camera. High-value for b-roll/asset presentation in essays.

Procedural photo grid with a 3-step choreography: (1) N images fly in to fill a cols×rows grid, sequenced one-by-one / by row / by col; (2) one image zooms to fill the center while the rest of the grid peters out; (3) it zooms back and the grid returns. Computed from grid shape + timings, so 40 images is just a list. Polaroid/plain/cutout frames.
